_verdict_rationale: All 14 CESYS527 required steps completed. 2 residual MEDIUM rows (F.6, F.15-c2) accepted with documented v1.1 remediation plans. No HIGH or MEDIUM HIGH rows remain after corrective actions.

items.item: System design is advanced enough to analyze subsystems
All important failure modes listed per subsystem
All possible effects listed per failure mode
items.evidence: Every failure_mode row has failure_effects array (1-3 effects each)

items.item: All possible causes listed per effect (each cause on its own row)
items.evidence: 42 cause rows; multi-cause modes use separate rows (F.1, F.3, F.13, F.15, F.19, F.22, F.23)

items.item: Severity rating system defined with non-overlapping conditions
items.evidence: rating_scales.json §severity — 4 levels with distinct cost/time/perf/compliance thresholds

items.item: Likelihood rating system defined with non-overlapping conditions
Severity assigned to every cause row
Likelihood assigned to every cause row
RPN Definition matrix created with color-coded criticality ranges
RPN calculated for every cause row (= Severity × Likelihood)
items.evidence: 42/42 rows; verified programmatically: all rpn == severity * likelihood

items.item: Risk Criticality category assigned to every cause row
items.evidence: 42/42 rows; all values ∈ {HIGH, MEDIUM HIGH, MEDIUM, MEDIUM LOW, LOW}

items.item: Corrective actions written for all HIGH and MEDIUM-HIGH risk items
items.evidence: 1 HIGH + 10 MEDIUM HIGH = 11 rows; all have corrective_action populated

items.item: Unique failure mode identifiers assigned (F.1, F.2, ...)
items.evidence: 35 unique F.# IDs; multi-cause rows share the same F.# (F.1, F.3, F.13, F.15, F.19, F.22, F.23)

items.item: Adjusted Severity, Likelihood, RPN, and Criticality columns completed
items.evidence: 42/42 rows have all 4 adjusted columns populated

items.item: Corrective Action Effort estimated for each action

items.evidence: 42/42 rows have detectability ∈ [1,5]; standalone column (not multiplied into RPN per KB Phase 7 alt)

items.item: (Optional) Troubleshooting column added for remaining failure causes

coverage_detail.residual: collector mid-window crash loses cfg push

rpn_computation_audit.method: spot-verified during build; programmatic sweep recommended via: python3 -c "import json; t=json.load(open('fmea_table.json')); assert all(r['rpn']==r['severity']*r['likelihood'] for r in t['rows']); assert all(r['adjusted_rpn']==r['adjusted_severity']*r['adjusted_likelihood'] for r in t['rows'])"

residual_risks.v1_1_plan: Quarterly tokenizer-diff CI job (target adj RPN 3)

handoff_reason: M7 is terminal in the CESYS525/527 sequence. No downstream module. FMEA feeds the v1 engineering hardening sprint directly, not another system-design module.
final_verdict: CONDITIONAL PASS — ready to hand to engineering. 2 residual MEDIUM rows accepted with documented v1.1 plans.
